summary: 13 findings: 2 CRITICAL (O(N²) BM25 rebuild, race condition in add_chunks), 4 HIGH (race in hybrid search, delete_document BM25 state, per-document BM25 rebuild in add_chunks), 5 MEDIUM (search result validation, db_path validation, corpus growth, __init__ concurrent read, no retry logic), 2 LOW (API inconsistency, missing type annotation)

entries.title: BM25 O(N) rebuild on every add_document call
entries.problem: add_document() rebuilds entire BM25Okapi from scratch on every single addition, causing O(N) time per add. Known issue EC-003 with no mitigation.
entries.fix: Replace with batch accumulation + single rebuild; collect pending chunks, rebuild when threshold reached

entries.title: Race condition in add_chunks concurrent access
entries.problem: add_chunks() modifies shared state (collection + bm25_index) without thread synchronization. Concurrent calls corrupt BM25 index.
entries.fix: Add threading.Lock around critical sections or use queue-based background processing

entries.title: Hybrid search stale index reference race condition
entries.problem: get_context() hybrid search fetches bm25_index.chunks by index after search, but another thread can modify chunks between search and lookup, causing stale references.
entries.fix: Snapshot bm25_index.chunks before fusion, or use document IDs instead of list indices

entries.title: delete_document leaves BM25 index in inconsistent state
entries.problem: delete_document() filters bm25_index.chunks but does NOT rebuild the index. Subsequent hybrid searches return stale results.
entries.fix: Call bm25_index.build_index() with remaining chunks after filtering

entries.title: add_chunks calls per-document BM25 rebuild in loop
entries.problem: Even batch add_chunks calls add_document() per chunk, triggering full O(N) BM25 rebuild per chunk. Should add all then rebuild once.
entries.fix: Batch all chunks into bm25_index.chunks first, call build_index() once at end

entries.title: search() assumes results structure completeness without validation
entries.problem: search() only checks results['documents'] but not metadatas/distances. zip at lines 400-403 will fail silently on partial results.
entries.fix: Add validation that all result arrays exist and are non-empty before zip

entries.title: db_path parameter has no path validation
entries.problem: db_path accepts any string without sanitization. Path traversal possible if constructed from untrusted input.
entries.fix: Validate with Path.resolve(), reject paths with '..' components

entries.title: Unbounded BM25 corpus growth with no cleanup
entries.problem: bm25_index.chunks grows indefinitely with no size limit or pruning mechanism.
entries.fix: Add optional max_corpus_size with LRU eviction or periodic compaction

entries.title: __init__ reads ChromaDB during potential concurrent write
entries.problem: collection.get() during __init__ may return partial/inconsistent data if another process is writing. No retry logic.
entries.fix: Add retry logic with exponential backoff for initial state loading

entries.title: No retry logic on any ChromaDB operations
entries.problem: ChromaDB (SQLite-backed) can throw 'database is locked' errors under concurrent access. No retry logic exists on any method.
entries.fix: Add retry decorator with configurable retries and exponential backoff

entries.title: add_chunks_with_embeddings has no dedup unlike add_chunks
entries.problem: add_chunks() silently skips duplicate IDs, but add_chunks_with_embeddings() raises ValueError on existing IDs. Inconsistent API behavior.
entries.fix: Add optional skip_existing parameter matching add_chunks() pattern

entries.title: Missing type annotation on batch_size parameter
entries.problem: batch_size parameter lacks type annotation, inconsistent with other methods.

entries.title: sys import at module level only used in conditional block
entries.problem: sys is imported at module level but only used inside PyInstaller frozen check conditional.
entries.fix: Move sys import inside the conditional block at line 48
